title: CoilFeatureInput Object
description: This class defines the methods and properties that pertain to the definition of a coil feature.

methods.name: classType
methods.description: Static function that all classes support that returns the type of the class as a string. The returned string matches the string returned by the objectType property. For example if you have a reference to an object and you want to check if it's a SketchLine you can use myObject.objectType == fusion.SketchLine.classType().

methods.name: setToHeightAndPitchCoil
methods.description: Sets the coil type to HeightAndPitchCoilType.

methods.name: setToRevolutionAndHeight
methods.description: Sets the coil type to RevolutionsAndHeightCoilType.

methods.name: setToRevolutionsAndPitch
methods.description: Sets the coil type to RevolutionsAndPitchCoilType.

methods.name: setToSpiral
methods.description: Sets the coil type to SpiralCoilType.

properties.name: angle
properties.description: Gets the angle. Returns null in the case where the coilType property returns SpiralCoilType.

properties.name: basePlane
properties.description: Gets and sets the base plane.

properties.name: coilSectionPosition
properties.description: Gets the section position of the coil. It defaults to InsideCoilSectionPosition.

properties.name: coilSectionType
properties.description: Gets the section type of the coil. It defaults to CircularCoilSectionType.

properties.name: coilType
properties.description: Gets the type of the coil.

properties.name: height
properties.description: Gets the height. Returns null in the case where the coilType property returns RevolutionsAndPitchCoilType.

properties.name: isClockwiseRotation
properties.description: Gets and sets whether the rotation is clockwise or counter-clockwise. A value of true indicates clockwise rotation. It defaults to true.

properties.name: isSolid
properties.description: Specifies if the coil should be created as a solid or surface. This is initialized to true so a solid will be created if it's not changed. It only can be set to false in non-parametric modeling.

properties.name: isValid
properties.description: Indicates if this object is still valid, i.e. hasn't been deleted or some other action done to invalidate the reference.

properties.name: objectType
properties.description: This property is supported by all objects in the API and returns a string that contains the full name (namespace::objecttype) describing the type of the object.   It's often useful to use this in combination with the classType method to see if an object is a certain type. For example: if obj.objectType == adsk.core.Point3D.classType():

properties.name: operation
properties.description: Gets and sets the type of operation performed by the coil.

properties.name: pitch
properties.description: Gets the pitch. Returns null in the case where the coilType property returns RevolutionsAndHeightCoilType or SpiralCoilType.

properties.name: revolutions
properties.description: Gets the revolutions number. Returns null in the case where the coilType property returns HeightAndPitchCoilType.

properties.name: sectionSize
properties.description: Gets and sets the section size.

properties.name: targetBaseFeature
properties.description: When creating a feature that is owned by a base feature, set this property to the base feature you want to associate the new feature with. By default, this is null, meaning it will not be associated with a base feature.   Because of a current limitation, if you want to create a feature associated with a base feature, you must set this property AND call the startEdit method of the base feature, create the feature, and then call the finishEdit method of the base feature. The base feature must be in an "edit" state to be able to add any additional items to it.

angle.title: CoilFeatureInput.angle Property
angle.description: Gets the angle. Returns null in the case where the coilType property returns SpiralCoilType.

syntax.python:
# Get the value of the property.
propertyValue = coilFeatureInput_var.angle

setToHeightAndPitchCoil.description: Sets the coil type to HeightAndPitchCoilType.

syntax.python: returnValue = coilFeatureInput_var.setToHeightAndPitchCoil(height, pitch, angle)
syntax.cpp:
